recommendations.title: Wishmaster 3: Beyond the Gates of Hell
recommendations.overview: The evil Djinn is back at it again, this time wreaking havoc on the students of Illinois' Baxter University. His victim is a beautiful, innocent and studious teenage girl named Diana Collins who accidentally opened up the Djinn's tomb and released hi

recommendations.title: El Gringo
recommendations.overview: A man crossing into Mexico with a satchel of $2,000,000—and a bloody past—finds himself under sudden attack in the sleepy town of El Fronteras.

recommendations.title: Behind the Mask: The Rise of Leslie Vernon
recommendations.overview: The next great psycho horror slasher has given a documentary crew exclusive access to his life as he plans his reign of terror over the sleepy town of Glen Echo, all the while deconstructing the conventions and archetypes of the horror genre for them

recommendations.title: Jaws
recommendations.overview: When the seaside community of Amity finds itself under attack by a dangerous great white shark, the town's chief of police, a young marine biologist, and a grizzled shark hunter embark on a desperate quest to kill the beast before it strikes again.

recommendations.title: The Prowler
recommendations.overview: Thirty years after a murder on the night of Avalon Bay's graduation dance, the sleepy town's teens meet grisly ends at the hands of a prowler once thought to be a jilted soldier home from war.

recommendations.title: Death Machine
recommendations.overview: Chaank Armaments is experimenting with the ultimate fighting machine which is part human - part machine. So far, the Hardman project has been unreliable and has killed a number of innocent people. The genius behind this project is Jack who lives in a

recommendations.title: 3-Headed Shark Attack
recommendations.overview: The world’s greatest killing machine is three times as deadly, when a mutated shark threatens a cruise ship. As the shark eats its way from one end of the ship to the next, the passengers fight the deadly predator using anything they can find.

recommendations.title: The Hunter
recommendations.overview: Martin, a mercenary, is sent from Europe by an anonymous biotech company to the Tasmanian wilderness on a hunt for the last Tasmanian tiger.

recommendations.title: Troll
recommendations.overview: When an explosion in the Norwegian mountains awakens an ancient troll, officials appoint a fearless paleontologist to stop it from wreaking deadly havoc.

recommendations.title: Fear Below
recommendations.overview: A rag-tag team of divers attempting to salvage a sunken car from a river are thwarted by a highly aggressive bull shark.
